name: relab-fullstack
postAttachCommand:
echo '🚀 Fullstack dev container ready!
📦 If node_modules/.venv are missing, run pnpm install --frozen-lockfile and uv sync in the relevant subrepo
💡 Web frontend: http://localhost:8010
💡 Backend: http://localhost:8011
💡 Docs: http://localhost:8012
💡 App frontend: http://localhost:8013'
